detected_concepts: John Swift is a 76 year-old male presenting with shortness of breath and palpitations
disorganized electrical activity in atria => no coordinated atrial depolarization
uncoordinated atrial contractions --> random conduction to ventricles --> irregular ventricular rhythm
palpitations, SOB, lightheadedness and sweating => sx of poor cardiac output
high respiratory rate: compensation for decreased cardiac output
